zh.lifeSummary: 當Rachel Anna Dising於1584年1月29日出生在英國素福爾可丹納姆時，她的父親Thomas Jacob Dising22歲，母親Elizabeth Lovell22歲。她於1603年6月29日與Thomas Cross在英國薩默塞特哈林其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1622年在英國薩默塞特卡寧頓享年38歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可丹納姆 聖 約翰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rachel Anna Dising于1584年1月29日出生在英国素福爾可丹納姆时，她的父亲Thomas Jacob Dising22岁，母亲Elizabeth Lovell22岁。她于1603年6月29日与Thomas Cross在英国薩默塞特哈林其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1622年在英国薩默塞特卡寧頓享年38岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可丹納姆 聖 約翰。

nameMeanings.name: Dising
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an altered form of Leising, a habitational name from a place so named in Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Rachel Anna Dising was born on 29 January 1584, in Denham, Suffolk, England, her father, Thomas Jacob Dising, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Lovell, was 22. She married Thomas Cross on 29 June 1603, in Charlinch, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1622, in Cannington, Somerset, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Denham St John, Suffolk, England.

fr.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rachel Anna Dising est née le 29 janvier 1584, à Denham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Jacob Dising, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lovell, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Cross le 29 juin 1603, à Charlinch, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1622, à Cannington, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Denham St John, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Rachel Anna Dising am 29. Januar 1584 in Denham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Jacob Dising 22 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lovell 22. Sie hat am 29. Juni 1603 in Charlinch, Somerset, England Thomas Cross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1622 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Cannington, Somerset, England und wurde in Denham St John, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Anna Dising è nata il il 29 gennaio 1584 nel Denham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Jacob Dising, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Lovell, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Cross il 29 giugno 1603, nel Charlinch, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1622, nel Cannington, Somerset, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Denham St John, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Anna Disingが1584年1月29日にイギリススフォルクデンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Jacob Disingは22歳，母Elizabeth Lovellは22歳であった。1603年6月29日にイギリスソメルセトチャーリンチでThomas Crossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1622年にイギリスソメルセトカニントンで38歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクデンハム スト ジョンにて埋葬された。

ko.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Anna Dising(이)가 1584년 1월 29일 영국 수폴크 데함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Jacob Dising(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lovell(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1603년 6월 29일 영국 서머세트 찰린치에서 Thomas Cross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1622년 영국 서머세트 캔잉턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 데함 스트 존에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Anna Dising nasceu em 29 de janeiro de 1584, em Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Jacob Dising, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lovell, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Cross em 29 de junho de 1603, em Charlinch, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1622, em Cannington, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Denham St John, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk distric: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rachel Anna Dising родилась 29 января 1584 г. в местности денам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Jacob Dising было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lovell, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Cross 29 июня 1603 г. в местности чарлинч, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1622 г. в местности каннингтон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности денам ст джон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rachel Anna Dising nació el 29 de enero de 1584, en Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Jacob Dising, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lovell, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas Cross el 29 de junio de 1603, en Charlinch, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1622, en Cannington, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Denham St John, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
